_about: Batch template for AUAE. Either set 'input_folder' to a folder of volumes (classic folder-in/folder-out) or fill 'volumes' with explicit input paths. Each volume is segmented, post-processed, optionally extended, and written to its own subfolder under 'output_root'.

_fields.mode: 'segment' (default) segments the CT/CBCT volumes; 'extend' extends existing airway segmentation files listed in 'volumes' (no model or GPU needed).
_fields.input_folder: Optional. Folder of input volumes (.nii/.nii.gz/.nrrd/.nhdr/.mha/.mhd). When set and 'volumes' is empty, every volume in it is processed and 'output_root' defaults to an 'AUAE_output' folder beside it.
_fields.output_root: Folder where a per-volume subfolder is created. Leave empty to be asked at run time (or to default beside input_folder).
_fields.subfolder_from: How each output subfolder is named: 'filename' = the input file stem.
_fields.export_formats: Any of STL, OBJ (surface meshes), NIFTI, NRRD (labelmaps).
_fields.export_targets: What to write: any of 'airway', 'external' (the external face-air segment), 'merged' (all segments in one file). Missing segments are skipped.
_fields.remove_small_islands: Drop connected components smaller than min_island_mm3 (upstream cleanup, reimplemented without the editor).
_fields.keep_largest_island: Keep only the single largest component. Off by default.
_fields.min_island_mm3: Small-island threshold in mm^3. Upstream default is 0.3^3 * 200 = 5.4.
_fields.include_internal_air: Add the internal air cavities the model drops (paranasal / sinonasal sinuses) back into the airway, by thresholding the air enclosed inside the head. Off by default.
_fields.min_internal_air_mm3: Size threshold (mm^3) for recovered internal cavities. Components below it are dropped, which removes the smaller cephalostat air bubbles near the frontal sinus before merging. Default 250.
_fields.segment_external_air: Also segment the ambient air in front of the face as a second segment (flow-modelling inlet). Off by default.
_fields.merge_external_air: When segment_external_air is true, merge that air into the airway to form a single fluid-domain segment instead of two segments.
_fields.smoothing_factor: Closed-surface smoothing factor 0-1 for the exported mesh (0 = raw voxels). Default 0.
_fields.extension: Our airway extension for flow modelling: repeats the terminal slice to extend the mask inferiorly (towards the neck). When merged with the external air, the extension is applied to the airway before the merge.
_fields.extension.enabled: true to extend the final mask.
_fields.volumes: Ordered input paths. In 'segment' mode: CT/CBCT volumes. In 'extend' mode: saved airway segmentation labelmaps (.nii.gz/.nrrd).
